title: Ladies of the Jury
writer: John Frederick Ballard, Marion Dix, Salisbury Field
actors: Edna May Oliver, Jill Esmond, Roscoe Ates
plot: Society matron Mrs. Crane (Edna May Oliver) is selected as a juror in the trial of ex-chorus girl Yvette Gordon (Jill Esmond), who's accused of murdering her rich elderly husband. In court, Mrs. Crane is your unorthodox, disruptiv...
